data.description_suggestion: Submit a driver performance rating for a completed shipment. Accepts a rating value between 1 and 5 stars via the RatingRequest schema. The rating is associated with the specified shipment ID and persists in the driver's performance history. Returns a RatingResponse confirming the rating was recorded. Requires authentication via bearer token.

data.current_summary: Retrieve signature image for a shipment
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve the delivery signature image for a completed shipment. Returns the signature proof image captured at delivery. Requires the shipment ID as a path parameter and authentication via bearer token. The image confirms the recipient's signature upon delivery completion.
data.reasoning: Description is empty. Added context about what the signature image represents (delivery proof), when it's available (after delivery completion), authentication requirements, and the business purpose to help AI agents understand when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'getPickupImage' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Description is empty. Added context about what the pickup photo represents (proof of collection), when it's available (after pickup), authentication requirements, and the business purpose to help AI agents understand the operation's function.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieve the pickup confirmation photo for a shipment. Returns the image captured by the driver at the pickup location, confirming the shipment was collected. Requires the shipment ID as a path parameter and authentication via bearer token. The photo serves as proof of pickup.

data.description_suggestion: Generates a delivery price estimate based on pickup and delivery locations, items, and optional service parameters. Accepts an EstimateRequest containing origin/destination addresses, item details, and optional time windows or special handling requirements. Returns an Estimate object with the calculated price quote. This operation does not create a shipment and can be called multiple times to compare pricing scenarios.
data.reasoning: Description is completely empty. Added context about what inputs are expected (locations, items, options), what is returned (Estimate with price), and clarified that this is a non-binding quote operation to help AI agents understand when to use this versus createShipment.

message: Operation 'createShipment' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description is empty. Added details about required inputs (locations, items, contact info), what is returned (Shipment with ID and status), and important side effect that shipment enters driver assignment queue. data.current_summary: Create and schedule a new delivery
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new shipment and schedules it for delivery. Accepts a CreateShipmentRequest containing pickup/delivery locations, items, recipient contact information, and optional delivery time windows or special instructions. Returns the created Shipment object with a unique Roadie ID and current status. The shipment is immediately queued for driver assignment. Requires bearer token authentication.
data.reasoning: Description is empty. Added details about required inputs (locations, items, contact info), what is returned (Shipment with ID and status), and important side effect that shipment enters driver assignment queue. Included authentication requirement for AI agent clarity.

data.description_suggestion: Updates shipment details using partial update semantics. Accepts the shipment ID as a path parameter and an UpdateShipmentRequest containing fields to modify (e.g., delivery address, items, special instructions). Returns the updated Shipment object. Only modifiable fields are accepted - attempting to update locked fields (e.g., after driver assignment) will result in an error. Requires bearer token authentication.
data.reasoning: Description is empty. Added critical context about timing constraints (before driver assignment), partial update semantics, what fields can be modified, error behavior for locked fields, and authentication. message: Operation 'cancelShipment' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description is empty. Added context about timing constraints (before pickup confirmation), what happens after cancellation (status change), optional parameters for cancellation reason, return value, and authentication. data.current_summary: Cancel a shipment before pickup is confirmed
data.description_suggestion: Cancels a shipment and removes it from the delivery queue. Accepts the shipment ID as a path parameter and optional query parameters (e.g., cancellation reason). Returns the cancelled Shipment object with status updated to 'cancelled'. Shipments can only be cancelled before the driver confirms pickup. After pickup confirmation, cancellation is not permitted. Requires bearer token authentication.
data.reasoning: Description is empty. Added context about timing constraints (before pickup confirmation), what happens after cancellation (status change), optional parameters for cancellation reason, return value, and authentication. Clarified the state transition and when operation is unavailable for AI agent decision-making.

data.description_suggestion: Adds or updates a tip for the driver on a specific shipment. Accepts the shipment ID as a path parameter and a TipRequest containing the tip amount. Returns a TipResponse confirming the tip has been recorded. Tips can be added after the driver has accepted the shipment. The tip amount is added to the driver's earnings for this delivery. Requires bearer token authentication.
